title: Federal government to launch AI and Culture Advisory Council
description: The federal government announced a new advisory council to help it protect Canada’s creative industries from rapid advancements in AI, as the first National Summit on Artificial Intelligence and Culture wrapped up in Banff on Tuesday.
content:

title: EU Moves to Ban AI That Creates Nonconsensual Sexual Images
description: Artificial intelligence tools that can be used to create nonconsensual sexual images may be banned in the European Union, following outcry after users used Elon Musk’s Grok service to generate thousands of undressed pictures of women and children.
